site.title: Gerald M. Gumahad — SEO & Data Analyst
site.description: Chemical Engineer turned SEO Assistant and Data Analyst. Turning data into rankings and insights into action.

hero.name: Gerald M. Gumahad
hero.title: SEO Assistant · Data Analyst
hero.tagline: Turning raw data into rankings — and insights into action.

about.bio: I'm a Chemical Engineer transitioning into Data Analytics and SEO, bringing a strong foundation in analytical thinking, problem-solving, and process optimization. I have hands-on experience with data handling, reporting, and extracting insights — alongside practical SEO work in keyword research, on-page optimization, and content development.

projects.title: Law Firm SEO Optimization
projects.description: Managed end-to-end on-page SEO for two law firm websites — LevyLaw and GGHLaw. Optimized title tags, meta descriptions, headers, URLs, and internal links. Conducted keyword research and site audits to close content gaps.

projects.title: Chemical Inventory Tracking System
projects.description: Developed and implemented an Excel VBA–based system to systematically record, monitor, and analyze chemical inventory data for Taganito HPAL Nickel Corporation. Improved data accuracy and traceability across operations.

projects.title: Plant Operations Data Dashboard
projects.description: Built structured datasets and visual dashboards for inventory, production, and environmental monitoring during tenure with the Department of Science and Technology. Produced comprehensive technical and regulatory reports.

projects.title: SEO Audit & Competitor Analysis
projects.description: Performed comprehensive site audits and competitor analysis to identify content gaps and optimization opportunities. Contributed to off-page SEO initiatives including backlink outreach and guest posting strategies.

projects.title: Canva Design Portfolio
projects.description: A collection of graphic design work created in Canva, including social media graphics, presentations, and marketing materials. Showcases visual communication skills alongside data and SEO work.

projects.title: Organic Traffic Growth — Semrush
projects.description: Screenshot evidence of organic traffic growth achieved through on-page SEO optimizations. Tracked using Semrush showing keyword ranking improvements, traffic increases, and visibility gains over time.

experience.description: Supported on-page SEO, keyword research, site audits, competitor analysis, and off-page initiatives including backlink outreach and guest posting. Managed websites: LevyLaw & GGHLaw.

Analyzed large plant operational datasets, maintained structured datasets for inventory and environmental monitoring, coordinated monthly project meetings, and produced technical and regulatory reports.
Collected and analyzed operational data to identify inefficiencies, prepared technical reports for management, and developed an Excel VBA system for chemical inventory tracking.

experience.role: Bachelor of Science in Chemical Engineering
experience.company: Mindanao State University – Iligan Institute of Technology
experience.description: Graduated with a degree in Chemical Engineering, building a strong foundation in analytical thinking, process optimization, and data-driven problem solving.

experience.company: Mindanao State University – Iligan Institute of Technology
experience.description: Completed diploma-level technical education in chemical engineering technology.
